name: kds-slicer-server
description: Backend API для модуля нарезчика (Slicer Station)

scripts.migrate: psql -U postgres -d arclient -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/001_create_slicer_tables.sql && psql -U postgres -d arclient -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/002_seed_defaults.sql && psql -U postgres -d arclient -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/003_dish_aliases.sql && psql -U postgres -d arclient -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/004_dish_categories.sql && psql -U postgres -d arclient -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/005_dish_stoplist.sql && psql -U postgres -d arclient -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/006_kds_stoplist_sync.sql
